name: Morphous Puffin
description: A shadcn/tweakcn-compatible clear coastal system to be coded from the Puffin light and dark design-system boards: black-and-white structure, coral-orange beak actions, sea-blue navigation, and cliff-neutral depth. The light and dark design-system boards are the reference for coding any future theme.
typography: Geist for clear coastal product UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for labels, headings, and numeric rhythm.
layout: Crisp 8px grids, beak-stripe dividers, high-contrast cards, coastal dashboard panels, and compact content surfaces.
